chapter_title.ar: باب التَّعْقِيبِ بَعْدَ الصَّلَاةِ وَ الدُّعَاءِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 32 – The follow up after the Salāt and the supplication

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/176)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/176)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ تَسْبِيحُ فَاطِمَةَ ( عليها السلام ) فِي كُلِّ يَوْمٍ فِي دُبُرِ كُلِّ صَلَاةٍ أَحَبُّ إِلَيَّ مِنْ صَلَاةِ أَلْفِ رَكْعَةٍ فِي كُلِّ يَوْمٍ .

en.hubeali: And from him, from Abu Khalid Al Qammat who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws saying: ‘The Glorification (Tasbīḥ) of Fatimaasws during every day at the end of every Salāt is more beloved to me than a Salāt of a thousand Rak’at during every day’.
en.sarwar: 15. It is narrated from the same narrator as the previous Hadith from abu Khalid al-Qammat who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ‘Tasbih of Fatimah al-Zahra’, ‘Alayha al-Salam, every day after every Salah (prayer) is more beloved to me than one thousand Rak‘at prayer every day.’”
